title: Basic Rhythm & Rests
description: Learn the most common note durations: whole, half, quarter, and their corresponding rests.

lessons.title: The Sound of Silence
lessons.description: Learn what rests are and how they correspond to note durations.
lessons.prompt: Explain the concept of musical rests. Introduce the whole rest, half rest, and quarter rest. Explain that silence is just as important as sound in music. Provide simple 4/4 exercises with a single Middle C and various rests so the user can practice waiting.

lessons.title: Rhythm Mix-Up
lessons.description: Combine whole, half, and quarter notes with their rests.
lessons.prompt: Create exercises combining whole, half, and quarter notes with their corresponding rests in 4/4 time. Use only the note Middle C to keep the focus entirely on rhythm reading rather than pitch reading.
